_comment: Curated, hand-editable allowlist for build_happenings.py (the Nats Nation page). Only free / official / public feeds. Every URL here was live-verified 2026-06-28. 'team' feeds are Nationals-dedicated (all items qualify). 'league' feeds are MLB-wide and are filtered to items whose text matches team_keywords. No paid APIs, no scraping, no social-media scraping. Reddit/MASN/mlb.com-team-RSS were evaluated and excluded (rate-limited / dead / 403). To add a source: confirm it's official+public, add it here, and the generator picks it up — no code change needed.
_falkor_ingestor_note: Recorded for completeness. Phase-0 live recon (2026-06-28) found the Falkor unified ingestor (FeedIngestor 4335 + Story Scraper 4336) returns ZERO Nationals/MLB items for these terms, so the ingestor is NOT used as a news source. Falkor's contribution is the /api/falkor/ingestors/enrich endpoint applied to the RSS articles above (falkor_enriched mode only).
